all_text: Abstract of Master's Thesis Wang  Liuna "BRICS countries cooperation in health against the backdrop of a new coronavirus pandemic" Educational Program - BRICS Studies Keywords:  BRICS, COVID-19, Sustainable Development Goals, World Health Organization, health cooperation  Relevance of the work.  Because of the difference in the level of development of each country, the road to achieving shared prosperity in the world is very long, this reflects the importance of cooperation. The BRICS countries are determined to cooperate in many areas to achieve common development. Health care is an important area of cooperation among the BRICS countries. If health care is developed, the standard of living increases, which will contribute to the economic development of all countries and contribute to the overall prosperity of the world. During the epidemic, the BRICS countries worked closely together to overcome the difficulties. They not only made wise use of their past experiences in health cooperation, but also laid a stronger foundation for the future development of BRICS health cooperation. Research on medical cooperation in the BRICS countries during this epidemic can better analyze the prospects for medical  cooperation and even other areas of the BRICS countries. The purpose of my paper is to: Determine the characteristics of BRICS countries' cooperation during the pandemic The paper has the following objectives: 1. to identify about the past and current cooperation in the field of health between the BRICS countries 2. to characterize the impact of new outbreaks of coronavirus on BRICS countries. 3. to analyze the challenges of cooperation in the event of an outbreak 4. identify the future of health cooperation among the BRICS countries. 5. analyze the current state of health development in different BRICS countries. The subject of the study is:  BRICS countries' cooperation in the field of health against the background of a pandemic new coronavirus infection. The object of the study is:  BRICS health systems. Theoretical and methodological foundations of the study:  Content analysis: to study the medicine and health policies of each country in the BRICS countries, as well as relevant documents and  conference reports in the process of medicine and health cooperation in the BRICS countries.  Comparative analysis method: compare the gap in the level of medicine and health care in the BRICS countries and analyze how to reduce the gap and achieve the overall development of medicine and health care in the five countries.  Forecasting method: predict the trends in the development of BRICS cooperation in medicine and health and global medicine and health, and analyze the prospects for the development of BRICS cooperation in medicine and health.  Historical method: analyze the history of the development of medicine and health of the BRICS countries, as well as cooperation in medicine and health between the five countries after the establishment of the BRICS organization, and analyze problems and solutions.

- Развитие индустрии.

Задачи:
- Создание новых технологических решений.
- Расширение производства и улучшение процессов.
- Участие в международных проектах и партнерствах.
- Обучение и развитие персонала.
- Укрепление позиций на рынке и повышение конкурентоспособности.
- Содействие социальному развитию и благополучию общества.
